mnemonics.title: CFG Components
mnemonics.content: Very Smart Rabbits Snack: V (non-terminals), Σ (terminals), R (rules), S (start)

acronyms.usage: Dynamic programming algorithm for CFG parsing

visualTips.visualization: Imagine upside-down tree: root (S) at top, branches splitting via productions, leaves as words

analogies.analogy: Like cooking recipes: Start symbol = dish name, productions = step-by-step instructions to break it into ingredients
